bills.title: Veterans: other; definition for veteran of the uniformed services; create.
bills.description: Amends 1965 PA 190 (MCL 35.61) to define veteran of the uniformed services, including NOAA and U.S. Public Health Service commissioned officers per Title 38.
bills.last_action: Bill electronically reproduced 11/12/2025; pending House Government Operations Committee.

bills.title: State personal identification cards: veteran designation for NOAA and USPHS officers.
bills.description: Amends 1972 PA 222 to add a veteran designation on state ID cards for NOAA and U.S. Public Health Service commissioned officers.

bills.title: Michigan Vehicle Code: veteran designation for NOAA and USPHS officers.
bills.description: Amends 1949 PA 300 to add a veteran designation on driver's licenses for NOAA and U.S. Public Health Service commissioned officers.

bills.title: Individual income tax: retirement pay equity for NOAA and USPHS officers.
bills.description: Amends 1967 PA 281 (MCL 206.30) to extend retirement/pension and disability income tax deductions to NOAA and U.S. Public Health Service commissioned officers on par with other uniformed services veterans. Primary advocacy target.
